COUNSEL APPEARED. MATTER HEARD IN CHAMBERS TO PRESERVE CONFIDENTIALITY OF THIS PROCEEDING. ARGUED AND THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL SUBJECT TO THE LAW FIRM OF GORDON & REES, LLP SUBJECT COUNSEL OBTAINING AN ORDER SHORTENTING TIME ON A MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL AND PLAINTIFF IS DIRECTED TO EXECUTE A DECLARATION THAT DUE DELIGENCE WAS MADE TO FIND ADEQUATE COUNSEL. BOTH DOCUMENTS ARE TO BE SUBMITTED TO THIS COURT AND THEREAFTER, THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. RECORD ORDERED SEALED. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY REPORTER, BELDON YEE, CSR# 2647 (302/REQ/AA)
